expectations.text: A new git commit was created even though no source files changed.
expectations.evidence: CHECKPOINTS.md was the staged diff — real commit, not --allow-empty.

expectations.text: The commit subject names the root cause (nginx/cookie/domain/staging).
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Traced staging logout regression to an nginx cookie-domain mismatch in infra/nginx/staging.conf — no code change...'.

expectations.text: CHECKPOINTS.md exists and contains one dated entry matching the commit subject.
expectations.evidence: Entry matches the commit subject verbatim, dated 2026-04-08.

expectations.text: The commit body explains the root cause (cookie domain / nginx proxy).
expectations.evidence: Body explains SNI + parent-domain cookie rejection, nginx not rewriting Set-Cookie.

expectations.text: The commit body references infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
The commit body states that app/auth.py is correct and was NOT changed.
expectations.evidence: 'Do NOT touch app/auth.py. The application code is correct.'

expectations.text: The commit body mentions the Monday maintenance window plan.
expectations.evidence: 'defer the fix to Monday's maintenance window'.

expectations.text: The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
